items.title: Compendium Grammatices Linguae Hebraeae
items.note: The HAB TEI identifies the preface and chapters I-XXXIII but contains page structure, not running-text transcription. No Markdown is generated.

items.title: Epistolae source gaps in the preferred Spinoza et Nous layer
items.note: The letters can be identified in Spinoza Web and critical editions, but no uniform non-OCR web transcription source has been accepted for these six items. Letter 49 has a surviving Latin autograph and image-level sources.

items.title: Ultimi barbarorum
items.note: This is a biographically reported placard phrase, not a surviving independent work or manuscript. It is excluded from the original-text Markdown corpus.
